request_description: Develop a new call feature named "Visual" — Automated documentation from recordings. Reading from a video recording to capture frames of evidence for documentation creation, update and review. New category: Visuals — regroups all recording calls from Live Session category. Fed with dates/times for evidence lookup or detection mode for knowledge project contents. Accepts video path files from GitHub repos. Standard/recognized libraries only (OpenCV, Pillow, NumPy) — no external tools or services.

session_data.work_summary: Continuation session for Visual Documentation feature. Delivered 7 artifacts: visual_cli.py (488 lines), methodology/visual-documentation.md (200 lines), CLAUDE.md Visuals integration, commands.md (14 Visuals commands), satellite-commands.md (8-group template), Publication #22 scaffold (287 lines), essential files (NEWS/PLAN/LINKS/publications README). PR #580 merged. Issue #556 closed.

pr_numbers.title: Visual Documentation — CLI, methodology, Publication #22, commands

todo_snapshot.content: Update essential files (NEWS, PLAN, LINKS, publications README)

session_data.request_description_full:
Reading from a video recording is a useful new innovation feature to capture frames of evidence for documentation creation, update and review. This will become a new call in a new category: Visuals. That category will regroup all recording known calls from Live Session category. The visualization tools and technics that you have developed in live-session sessions and upgrades should be officially defined as calls to be in the new category Visuals.
The feature in subject can be fed with a list of dates or/and times to look for evidence and it can also run as detection mode for knowledge project contents or any subject in a request that refers to use this automated call that could be called: "Visual" and provides a video path file in a GitHub repo.
The development feature challenge of this request is to use standard and recognized software libraries only. No external tool or external service can be used to create this feature.
Enjoy this new unprecedent innovative feature coding sub project of Knowledge system parent project !
This is an interactive session, start and wait.
